verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Savior of my soul I confide in You Through all my darkest moments In You I find my peace My comfort when I'm weak I trust in You, through storm and raging sea

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Faithful, You're my God You're the glory and the lifter of my head Your light it fills my days It leads me in Your ways Forever I surrender all to You

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: And I live to worship You My Jesus You're the only one for me Nothing will ever take Your place My precious savior Who can stand between my Lord and me

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord I live to honor You And I long to bring my life an offering Take me higher Draw me deeper I give all to be with You
